description: Persona provides identity verification, fraud prevention, and compliance workflows for businesses. Its platform includes APIs and hosted flows for managing inquiries, reports, transactions, cases, and related verification data.
summary: Persona exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.withpersona.com/api/v1` with a public OpenAPI spec and bearer-token authentication via Persona API keys; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or general-purpose CLI was found.
